auth.enter_email_reset: Enter your email to receive a reset link
auth.password_reset_sent: Password reset link sent to your email.
auth.failed_send_reset: Failed to send reset link. Please try again.
auth.password_reset_successful: Your password has been reset. You can now log in.

auth.verifying_email_wait: Please wait while we verify your email address...

auth.scan_qr_code: Scan this QR code with a Lightning wallet that supports LNURL-auth (e.g., Breez, Phoenix, Alby).
auth.provide_email_to_complete: Please provide your email address to complete registration.
auth.error_occurred: An error occurred. Please try again.
auth.registration_successful: Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account.
auth.failed_to_complete_registration: Failed to complete registration. Please try again.
auth.verification_email_resent: Verification email sent. Please check your inbox.
auth.nostr_choose_method: Choose how to sign in with your Nostr key:
auth.nostr_nip07_hint: Alby, nos2x, or other Nostr extension
auth.nostr_nip46_use_extension: For NIP-46 (e.g. nsecBunker), use your signer app to approve the login. If your signer injects NIP-07 in the browser, use the Extension option below.
auth.nostr_nsec_not_recommended: Not recommended – key can be exposed
auth.nostr_nsec_warning: Your private key will only be used in this browser to sign the login. It is never sent to the server. Still, using an extension or remote signer is safer.
auth.nostr_extension_required: No Nostr extension found. Install Alby, nos2x, or similar.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.get_started_description: Create a store to start accepting Bitcoin payments.
dashboard.upgrade_to_see_stats: Upgrade to Pro to see sales statistics and charts.
dashboard.stats_available_in_pro_message: Sales statistics and charts across your stores are available in Pro. Upgrade to see order counts, trends, and filter by store.

stores.title: Stores
stores.create_first_store_description: Create your first store to start accepting Bitcoin payments seamlessly.
stores.recommended_price_source: The recommended price source gets chosen based on the default currency.
stores.blink_description: Use Blink wallet for fast and reliable Lightning payments.
stores.aqua_description: Use Aqua wallet with Boltz plugin for a non-custodial experience.
stores.blink_paste: Paste your Blink connection string with server URL, API key, and wallet ID.
stores.descriptor_paste: Paste your Aqua wallet output descriptor (watch-only, no private keys).
stores.configure_later: You can also configure this later in Wallet Connection settings.
stores.aqua_warning_btcpay: The Aqua/Boltz wallet in BTCPay cannot be removed. It will only be removed when the store is deleted.
stores.aqua_limits_warning: Aqua has min/max limits (100–25,000,000 sats). It is not ideal for micropayments (zaps) and may have higher fees.
stores.blink_keys_warning: Create API keys with only "read" and "receive" permissions. Never use "write" - it would allow spending from your wallet.
stores.cashu_beta_notice_short: Cashu (BTCPay CashuMelt) is experimental. Invoices may show as paid before funds reach your Lightning wallet; mint outages or routing issues can cause loss or delay.
stores.cashu_beta_consent_checkbox: I understand Cashu is in beta and I accept the risks for myself and my customers.
stores.cashu_description: Ecash with a Cashu mint: mint URL plus a Lightning Address for plugin routing.
stores.wallet_connection_choose_wallet: This store does not have a wallet type yet, or you are choosing how to connect. Pick Cashu (mint + Lightning Address) or a classic Lightning wallet (Blink or Aqua descriptor).
stores.wallet_connection_choose_lightning_hint: Connection string or watch-only descriptor, same as on create store.
stores.wallet_connection_unsupported_title: Wallet type not supported on this screen
stores.wallet_connection_unsupported_body: This store is set to “{type}”. Configure it in BTCPay or contact support if you expected Cashu or Lightning options here.
stores.wallet_connection_switch_to_cashu_hint: Configure mint URL and Lightning Address instead of a Lightning wallet connection.
stores.aqua_wallet_connected_samrock_hint: Your wallet is already linked. You can generate a new SamRock QR to re-pair or switch to the Descriptor tab to update the watch-only descriptor.
stores.cashu_connected_via_plugin: Configured via the BTCPay Cashu plugin.
stores.cashu_mint_url_hint:
Examples: https://mint.minibits.cash/Bitcoin,
https://mint.coinos.io, https://mint.103100.xyz
- always use the full URL from your wallet or mint operator (paths like /Bitcoin are common).
stores.cashu_lightning_address_hint: Format user{'@'}domain - must be able to receive; used by the plugin for Lightning-related flows.
stores.cashu_lightning_address_coinos_prefix: Don't have a Lightning address yet? You can get one at
stores.cashu_warning_https: The mint URL must use https:// - insecure HTTP URLs are rejected.
stores.cashu_warning_mint_reachable: A wrong, offline, or blocked mint URL can cause failed invoices or settlements.
stores.cashu_warning_ln_address: A typo in the Lightning Address breaks payments; it must match the wallet you intend to use.
stores.cashu_payments_subtitle: Settlement rows from the BTCPay Cashu plugin for this store.
stores.cashu_section_requires_cashu_wallet: Cashu settlements are only available for stores that use Cashu as the wallet type.
stores.descriptor_already_in_use: This descriptor is already in use
stores.descriptor_btcpay_once: BTCPay allows each descriptor to be used only once. Please use a different wallet/descriptor.
stores.failed_to_create: Failed to create store. Please try again.
stores.checklist_needs_wallet_type: This store does not have a wallet type yet. Finish setup in Wallet connection first.
stores.all_steps_required: Check items off after you verify them. All are recommended unless marked optional.
stores.failed_to_update_settings: Failed to update settings. Please try again.
stores.additional_settings_description: Additional store configuration options are managed through the satflux.io interface. All settings that can be configured are available above or through other satflux.io sections.
stores.archive_app_available_in_pro_message: Archive app is available in Pro and above. Upgrade to archive and unarchive your apps.
stores.archived_store_banner: The store has been archived and will no longer appear in the stores list by default.
stores.reports_subtitle: History of exported data and download links.
stores.reports_subtitle_monthly: Monthly automatic reports – history and download links.
stores.reports_monthly_will_appear_here: Monthly reports generated on the 1st of each month will appear here.
stores.reports_will_appear_here: Exports from the Invoices section will appear here.
stores.reports_upgrade_message: Download and retry are available in Pro. Upgrade to unlock full Reports features and automatic monthly exports.
stores.confirm_delete_report: Delete this report? This cannot be undone.
stores.pdf_report_popup_blocked: Pop-up was blocked. Allow pop-ups for this site to download the PDF.
stores.pdf_report_unauth: Please log in again to download the PDF.
stores.create_lightning_address_description: Create a Lightning Address to receive payments easily via a reusable address format your-username{'@'}{domain}.
stores.remove_lightning_address_confirm_before: Are you sure you want to remove
stores.manage_api_keys_for: Manage API keys for connecting your e-shop (WooCommerce, etc.) to
stores.create_api_key_description: Create an API key to connect external services like WooCommerce or other e-commerce platforms to your store.
stores.api_key_callback_url_hint: If provided, the API key will be automatically sent to this URL upon creation.
stores.api_key_limit_reached: You have reached the maximum number of API keys ({max}) for your current plan.
stores.store_limit_reached: You have reached the maximum number of stores ({max}) for your current plan.
stores.pos_advanced_options_pro_only: Advanced options can be edited on Pro plan and above. Upgrade to change these settings.
stores.pay_button_warning_title: Warning: Payment button should only be used for tips and donations
stores.pay_button_warning_text: Using the payment button for e-commerce integrations is not recommended since order relevant information can be modified by the user. For e-commerce, you should use our Greenfield API. If this store process commercial transactions, we advise you to create a separate store before using the payment button.
stores.pay_button_enable_description: To start using Pay Button, you need to enable this feature explicitly. Once you do so, anyone could create an invoice on your store (via API, for example).
stores.stripe_test_mode_banner: Test Mode: Using Stripe test API keys. Payments will not be real.
stores.stripe_webhook_signing_secret_help: The webhook signing secret from Stripe (starts with whsec_). Required for secure webhook verification. Get from Stripe Dashboard → select webhook → Signing secret → Reveal.
stores.stripe_enable_description: Accept card payments via Stripe for this store.
stores.stripe_key_keep_placeholder: Leave empty to keep current key
stores.stripe_publishable_key_help: Your Stripe publishable API key (starts with pk_).
stores.stripe_secret_key_help: Your Stripe secret API key (starts with sk_).
stores.stripe_settlement_currency_help: Currency for Stripe charges (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).
stores.stripe_save_keys_first: Save your API keys first to configure webhooks.
stores.stripe_advanced_config_help: Optional JSON to customize PaymentIntent creation. Supported: payment_method_types, metadata, statement_descriptor_suffix, capture_method, setup_future_usage.
stores.stripe_clear_credentials_description: Remove API keys and webhook from BTCPay Server. Stripe will be disabled.
stores.stripe_clear_confirm_message: This will remove your API keys and webhook. Stripe payments will be disabled. This action cannot be undone.
stores.currency_placeholder: Select or type currency (e.g., USD, BTC, EUR)
stores.blink_connection_description: Connect your Blink wallet using a read+receive API key. Best for speed and reliability.
stores.aqua_connection_description: Connect a watch-only wallet using an output descriptor. Non-custodial Setup.
stores.samrock_description: Generate a one-time QR code and scan it with Aqua to configure Bitcoin, Lightning (Boltz), and optionally Liquid - without pasting a descriptor here.
stores.samrock_waiting_scan: Scan this QR in Aqua. Waiting for wallet to finish setup on BTCPay…
stores.samrock_connected_note: This store was linked using Aqua + SamRock (QR). BTCPay holds your receive configuration; Satflux stores no wallet descriptor.
stores.samrock_or_manual: Or enter your watch-only descriptor manually below.
stores.manual_config_required: Manual configuration by support team may be required.
stores.confirm_password_to_change: Enter your password to view or change the wallet connection.
stores.reveal_error: Could not load connection details. Please try again.
stores.connection_active_description: This store is ready to accept transactions. Good job!
stores.configuration_in_progress_description: Your wallet connection is being configured by our support team. You'll be notified when it's ready.
stores.connection_pending_description: Please wait while we process your wallet connection request.
stores.wallet_not_configured_description: To start accepting payments, please configure your wallet connection in
stores.create_first_invoice: Create your first invoice to start accepting payments.
stores.configure_wallet_connection: Configure your Lightning wallet connection for

stores.manage_store_config: Manage your store configuration and preferences.
stores.settings_tab_payment_desc: Default currency, timezone, invoice expiration, network fee, speed policy, and related options.
stores.settings_tab_lightning_desc: Lightning Network and LNURL options. LNURL is enabled by default for Lightning Addresses.
stores.email_rules_intro: Create rules to send automatic emails for invoice events. Choose a trigger, recipients, and optional condition so emails are sent only in relevant situations.
stores.email_rules_empty: No email rules yet. Add one to notify yourself or customers on invoice events.

email_rules_trigger_desc.InvoiceReceivedPayment: A payment has been detected for the invoice.
email_rules_trigger_desc.InvoiceExpired: Invoice expired without being fully paid.
email_rules_trigger_desc.InvoiceSettled: Invoice is fully paid and settled.
email_rules_trigger_desc.InvoicePaymentSettled: A specific payment for the invoice reached settled state.
email_rules_trigger_desc.InvoiceExpiredPaidPartial: Invoice expired and was only partially paid.
email_rules_trigger_desc.InvoicePaidAfterExpiration: Payment arrived after the invoice already expired.

stores.email_rules_condition_hint: If set, requires the galbar/jsonpath Composer package. Use JSONPath against a model with Invoice and Store objects (see docs). Leave empty to always run when the trigger matches.
stores.email_rules_send_buyer: Send to buyer email when present on the invoice
stores.email_rules_placeholder_examples_meta_no: Metadata fields depend on the specific invoice (plugin/app). If a key is missing in metadata, the placeholder stays unchanged.
stores.settings_tab_archived_desc: Archive this store to hide it from the main store list. Archived stores can still receive payments.
stores.settings_tab_rates_desc: Set the preferred price source and additional currencies to track. Rates are used for pricing and reports.
stores.settings_tab_checkout_desc: Default language, receipt, redirect, and other checkout options. These apply to the invoice/checkout experience.
stores.settings_tab_users_desc: Add and remove store users and assign roles. All managed in this panel.
stores.settings_tab_roles_desc: Roles define what each user can do in this store. Assign roles in the Users tab.
stores.settings_tab_webhooks_desc: Webhooks send HTTP events from your store to another server.
stores.settings_users_managed_in_panel: Store users and their roles are managed here. You can add or remove users and assign roles (Owner, Manager, Employee, Guest) when the user list is loaded.
stores.settings_webhooks_not_in_panel: Webhook management is not available in the panel at this time.
stores.settings_role_owner: Owner - Full access: settings, users, apps, invoices, and can delete the store.
stores.settings_role_manager: Manager - Can manage settings, apps, and invoices; cannot manage users or delete the store.
stores.settings_role_employee: Employee - Can view the store and create invoices; limited settings access.
stores.settings_role_guest: Guest - Read-only access to the store.
stores.settings_branding_desc: Custom color, logo, and CSS apply to public and customer-facing pages. Brand color is used as an accent.
stores.settings_fee_btc_ltc_only: Fee is shown for BTC and LTC on-chain payments only.
stores.settings_consider_paid_less: Consider invoice paid if amount is … % less (percent)
stores.settings_payment_invalid_after: Payment invalid if not confirmed after expiration (minutes)
stores.settings_invoice_settled_when: Consider invoice settled when payment has
stores.settings_additional_rates_desc: Comma-separated list of currencies (e.g. USD, EUR, JPY). Rates are recorded and available in reports.
stores.settings_enable_payment_when_amount: Enable payment methods only when amount is …
stores.settings_timer_before_expiration: Show a timer … minutes before invoice expiration
stores.settings_unify_onchain_ln: Unify on-chain and lightning payment URL/QR code
stores.settings_lightning_satoshis: Display Lightning payment amounts in Satoshis
stores.settings_lightning_hop_hints: Add hop hints for private channels to the Lightning invoice
stores.settings_lnurl_classic_mode_desc: For wallet compatibility: Bech32 encoded (classic) vs. cleartext URL (upcoming).
stores.settings_lnurl_allow_payee_comment: Allow payee to pass a comment
stores.settings_auto_detect_language_desc: Detects the language of the customer's browser.
stores.settings_html_title: Custom HTML title to display on Checkout page
stores.settings_support_url_desc: A "Contact Us" button with this link will be shown on the checkout page. Can contain the placeholders {OrderId} and {InvoiceId}. Can be any valid URI, such as a website, email, and Nostr.
stores.settings_lazy_payment_methods: Only enable the payment method after user explicitly chooses it
stores.settings_redirect_automatically: Redirect invoice to redirect url automatically after paid
stores.settings_receipt_enabled: Enable public receipt page for settled invoices
stores.settings_receipt_show_payments: Show the payment list in the public receipt page
stores.settings_receipt_show_qr: Show the QR code of the receipt in the public receipt page
stores.settings_delete_store_desc: This will permanently delete the store {name} and all its data, including invoices, apps, and settings. This action cannot be undone.
stores.settings_delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
stores.view_manage_transactions: View and manage your store transactions.
stores.export_queued_check_reports: Export job queued. You will receive an email when the file is ready.
stores.xlsx_export_available_in_pro_message: XLSX export is available in Pro and above. Upgrade to export invoices as Excel files.
stores.adjust_filters_create_invoice: Try adjusting your filters or create a new invoice.
stores.exports_will_appear_here: Exports generated from Invoices section will appear here.
stores.exports_available_in_pro_message: Export history and automatic monthly exports are available in Pro. Upgrade to access export history and receive settled invoices by email on the first of each month.

landing.hero_kicker: The merchant control panel for BTCPay Server.
landing.hero_headline: Run Bitcoin checkout for your business.
landing.hero_subheadline: PoS, invoices, tickets, Lightning addresses & exports - one dashboard and simplicity
landing.hero_description: Connect Blink, Aqua, or Cashu (beta). We orchestrate BTCPay; your encrypted connection strings stay yours and sats settle straight to your wallet.
landing.hero_trust_line: Payments always route to your wallet - even if a plan lapses.
landing.hero_carousel_hint: 3 real merchant flows: sell, invoice, reconcile
landing.hero_slide_preview_body: We’ll drop in real screenshots from the panel here once the UI is final.
landing.hero_audience_explore_hint: You want steps, not server admin.
landing.hero_blurb_btcpay: With SATFLUX, stores are powered by BTCPay Server on our infrastructure - you run day-to-day merchant work here (multi-store, PoS, tickets, exports) while sats still reach your wallet. The hosted service does not support connecting a third-party BTCPay server. Want SATFLUX and BTCPay fully under your control? The project is open source on GitHub for self-hosting.
landing.hero_blurb_explore: You do not need to become a BTCPay power user overnight. SATFLUX walks your team through stores, wallets, and terminals while Bitcoin still lands in keys you control.
landing.section_clarity_title: BTCPay handles the protocol. SATFLUX handles the merchant work.
landing.section_clarity_body: SATFLUX builds on BTCPay Server: that engine handles payments while you work from this dashboard - stores, PoS, tickets, and exports your accountant can use. Bitcoin still settles to your wallet. Prefer to own the full stack? Self-host SATFLUX from GitHub alongside your own BTCPay Server.
landing.how_it_works_intro: Everything you need to know in a few simple steps.
landing.step1_text: Create your account and Store. It's fast and intuitive.
landing.step2_text: Connect your store with your Lightning wallet: Blink, Aqua, or Cashu (beta). Receive funds directly to you-we don't hold any sats.
landing.step3_text: Create different types of terminals: KeyPad, List, or List with Cart.
landing.step4_text: Generate an API key and connect with WooCommerce, Shopify, Magento, Drupal and others.
landing.step5_text: Create a personalized address NAME{'@'}{domain}. All sats go directly to your wallet.
landing.step6_text: Create events, sell tickets for sats, and control entry efficiently. Scan QR codes directly in our app or manually search by ticket number or email and mark as checked-in.
landing.step7_text: Download CSV/PDF transaction exports compatible with standard accounting software.
landing.features_analytics_text: Detailed charts, overviews, and revenue exports for accounting.
landing.everything_you_need_description: Invoicing, PoS, event tickets, Lightning addresses, Pay Button, and Lightning/ecash-merchant tooling built around BTCPay and self-custody. Crowdfunding is on the way.
landing.multi_store_description: Run multiple businesses from a single dashboard. Switch contexts instantly and keep your finances organized.
landing.point_of_sale_description: Customizable PoS keypads for retail or mobile usage.
landing.invoicing_description: Create, track, and export invoices securely.
landing.feature_lightning_ecash_description: Take Lightning payments and optional Cashu settlements through your BTCPay store-fast checkout without giving us your keys.
landing.feature_lightning_ecash_bullet_ln: One Lightning setup per store: Blink (connection string), or Aqua / Boltz via watch-only descriptor or SamRock QR.
landing.feature_lightning_ecash_bullet_cashu: Cashu mint URL + Lightning address with plugin-backed settlement tracking in the app.
landing.feature_lightning_ecash_bullet_control: Encrypted connection strings stay yours; we orchestrate BTCPay, we don’t custody funds.
landing.feature_crowdfund_description: Goal-based campaigns with contributor visibility-launching after we solidify core store workflows.
landing.feature_checkout_tools_intro: Go beyond invoices: sell access, share branded receive endpoints, and embed checkout on your site.
landing.feature_checkout_tools_bullet_tickets: Event tickets with QR check-in from the app.
landing.feature_checkout_tools_bullet_ln: Lightning Addresses routed to your connected wallet.
landing.feature_checkout_tools_bullet_pay: Embeddable Pay Button for blogs and landing pages (e-commerce uses BTCPay API keys).
landing.pricing_description: Pay with sats. No credit card required.
landing.pricing_hero_subheadline: Two plans. No hidden fees. Everything you need to accept Bitcoin and Lightning payments.
landing.pricing_free_description: Everything you need to run one store with Point of Sale (PoS) terminals, a Lightning address, and basic reporting.
landing.pricing_pro_tagline: For growing businesses with multiple locations
landing.pricing_pro_description: More stores, deeper analytics, automatic reports, and extra options for in-person sales.
landing.pricing_need_more_text: For larger teams and custom requirements, we offer tailored plans with dedicated support.
landing.pricing_trust_text: Plans only affect management and automation features. Even if Pro expires, you still receive all Bitcoin and Lightning payments to your wallet. Your stores, PoS terminals, and payment links keep working.
landing.pricing_faq_custody_a: You do. Payments go directly to your wallet. We only provide the tools to accept them.
landing.pricing_faq_switch_a: Yes. Upgrade anytime. Downgrades take effect at the end of your billing period.
landing.pricing_faq_expire_a: You keep receiving payments. You lose access to Pro features (more stores, advanced stats, automatic exports) until you renew.
landing.pricing_feature_advanced_stats: Advanced stats (per store, per PoS, overall)
landing.pricing_enterprise_cash_card: PoS: mark orders as "Paid in Cash" or "Paid by Card" (for accounting)
landing.cashu_beta_notice: Cashu support is in beta-expect changes.
landing.cashu_pros: Ecash and Lightning together; you choose the mint; great for experimentation.
landing.cashu_cons: Beta: a wrong mint URL or Lightning Address can still break payments-double-check your settings.

support.title: Contact & Support
support.subtitle: Need help? We're here for you.

next_steps.wallet_description: Use the checklist to quickly verify payments and settings after creating your store.

setup_wizard.title: Setup guide
setup_wizard.step_wallet_desc: After you finish store creation, your wallet (Blink, Aqua, or Cashu) is already linked to this store so you can accept Bitcoin and Lightning. If automated setup is still running, you will see the status on the store dashboard.
setup_wizard.step_wallet_why: Review or change credentials in Wallet connection. The verification checklist covers optional checks (Lightning, test payment, and similar).
setup_wizard.step_pos_desc: A Point of Sale app is a payment terminal for your store. You can create one or more PoS apps - for example one per physical counter or device.
setup_wizard.step_pos_why: Each PoS has its own products and settings. Use it on a tablet or phone to create invoices and accept in-person payments.
setup_wizard.step_ln_address_desc: A Lightning Address is a human-readable address (like you{'@'}yourstore.com) that customers can use to send you Lightning payments. It is optional but useful for tips, donations, or simple pay links.
setup_wizard.step_ln_address_why: You can create and manage Lightning addresses in the LN Address section. Each address is linked to this store's wallet.

onboarding.pos_1_body: Create your first PoS terminal here. Click this to add a new Point of Sale app, then name it and configure the style and products.
onboarding.pos_2_body: Choose how your terminal looks: Keypad (simple keypad for amounts), Product list (list of items), or List with cart (add items to a cart). We recommend Keypad to start. Click Keypad (Light) below.
onboarding.pos_3_body: Here you can add products, set prices, and for Keypad mode optionally show item selection. You can also expand Extra Settings for currency, tax, and checkout options.
onboarding.pos_4_body: When you're done, click Save Settings to store your configuration. Then click Open PoS to open the terminal in a new tab and start accepting payments.
onboarding.pos_5_body: You can manage your store anytime via Store settings: wallet, invoices, users, and more. Click the gear icon to open Store settings.
